div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%

div.p: library: EmCareDT01, EmCareDT01, EmCareDT01, EmCareDT01, EmCareDT01, EmCareDT01

blockquote.p: description: Register a child < 5 years
definition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir//Questionnaire/q.EmCareB.Registration.P
description: Register the child in the encounter
kind: applicability

description: Determine Basic Anthropometric and others measurement
